comments.body: Did @baude beat you to it with #2594?
@TomSweeneyRedHat I think @baude forgot I was working this, but solutions are different enough to discuss.  We'll close one of these PR's.
i will withdraw my PR and support this one with the recommended changes. some food for thought, others not so much.
